Title: Root Set - Rust Bloom
Body (HTML):
Fresh tone, same ease.
The Root Set brings a warmer energy to a familiar silhouette, pairing a sleeveless V-neck top with tailored straight trousers in a rust bloom hemp-cotton blend. Easy, breathable, and quietly structured.
The top is defined by vertical stitch lines that add form without weight. An asymmetric button detail at the neckline introduces character, while front and back slits allow movement, subtle but noticeable.
The trousers follow with balance. Straight, clean, and tailored, they ground the richness of the color with a more composed line.
A set made for warm days that still ask for intention.

Fabric & Fit

Fabric: Hemp Cotton
Color: Azo free dyed Rust Bloom
Top Fit: Comfort, Length: 22"
Pant Fit: Tailored Straight, Length: 40" across all sizes
Model Fit: Model is 5'6" / wearing size S

Care Instructions

Care :
● Wash in cold water
● Use a gentle detergent
● Machine wash on a mild cycle or hand wash
● Air dry preferred, or tumble dry on low heat
● Iron on low heat
● Avoid bleach and harsh chemicals
● Do not overwash: air between wears
● Spot clean for small stains instead of full washing

Note:
● Wash separately for the first few washes, as slight colour release may occur.
● Garments with hand embroidery are best cared for through dry cleaning.
● Subtle variations in colour and texture are natural. Each piece is unique.
Just a little care, and the fabric will take care of the rest.

Title: Muse Set - Indigo
Body (HTML):
Sleeveless, intentional, elegant.
The Muse Set pairs a structured vest top with wide-leg trousers in deep indigo Kala cotton, bringing together ease and detail.
The top features a soft lapel neckline and gently curved hem panels that shape the silhouette without adding stiffness. Hand embroidery runs along the front opening and panel edges, not as a pattern, but as a line of detail that highlights the construction itself. Subtle, deliberate, and easy to notice up close.
The trousers complete the set with balance. Wide-legged and fluid, they move with ease while holding a clean, polished line.
The kind of outfit that needs no accessories. The kind that becomes one.

Title: Poise Set - Sage Green
Body (HTML):
In sage green, this co-ord becomes something else entirely.
The Poise Set brings together a structured corset-style top and high-waisted shorts, built on clean lines and quiet strength.
The top is defined by its high-low hemline, structured through the body while still allowing movement. Along the neckline, hand-embroidered French knots, wooden beads, and shell elements catch light differently against the cloth. The hand-embroidered fabric buttons on each side remain deliberate, functional, beautiful.
The shorts brings balance to the look. High-waisted with front pleats and stitch line finishing, they hold structure while staying easy to wear.
A co-ord that earns its silhouette.

Title: Cross Set - Pearl White
Body (HTML):
Quiet luxury doesn't announce itself.
The Cross Set understands this. A wrap top paired with a cropped straight pant, both built on clarity, precision, and restraint.
The top is cut in a wrap silhouette, structured at the waist and clean through the lines. It holds shape without feeling rigid. Shell beads finish the wrap end, a single detail that defines the piece. Nothing extra, nothing without intention.
The pant follows with equal ease. Cropped, straight, and relaxed, designed to ground the look without taking away from it. The kind of bottom that lets the top stand, while still holding its own.
Minimal. Controlled. Exactly the right amount of considered.

Title: Let It Be Set - Ecru
Body (HTML):
Effortless from morning to evening, this is the co-ord that moves with you.
The Let It Be Set brings together a sleeveless vest and wide culotte pants in natural ecru Kala cotton. Easy, breathable, and detailed.
The vest is cut with a sharp V-neckline and finished with a back tie that lets you adjust the fit as you like. A curved hem softens the structure. Across the front, hand-embroidered French knots, wooden beads, and shell fragments are scattered like seeds on open earth, irregular, intentional, alive.
The pants follow with the same ease. High-waisted with a wide culotte silhouette that falls with quiet movement. A half-belt, half-elastic waist allows comfort without losing shape. Deep pockets complete the piece.
Monochromatic in undyed ecru, the colour remains as the fabric is made. No pigment, no processing. Just cloth and craft.

Title: Aria Set - Sage Green
Body (HTML):
Volume in the right places. Stillness everywhere else.
The Aria Set pairs a peplum top with wide-leg trousers in sage green hemp, a combination that understands proportion without overthinking it.
The top is built on kali panels, each one placed with intent to create a flare that begins at the waist and opens into a soft, fluid shape. Structured at the waist, it holds form while feeling easy. The sleeves carry their own detail, defined and present without drawing too much attention.
The trousers follow through with the same ease. Wide-legged, and in movement.
Everything in yarn-dyed sage green hemp. Designed to move well and feel even better.

Title: Frame Top - Ecru
Body (HTML):
Some garments are worn. This one is experienced.
The Frame Top holds warmth in its tone, edged with natural camel piping that traces the neckline and front placket. It frames the piece quietly, giving it structure without weight.
A hand-smocked chevron strip runs down the center, adding depth and a sense of form. On one side, hand-embroidered French knots, wooden beads, and mother-of-pearl shell fragments are scattered across the shoulder and sleeve. Each placement is slightly different, making every piece one of its own.
Easy in fit, but considered in detail. Something you notice more, the longer you wear it.

Worn gentle, it settles with quiet clarity. Soft. Considered.

Title: Easy Day Set - Indigo
Body (HTML):
Slow down. That’s where this set belongs.
The Easy Day Set is built for days that don’t ask for too much - just ease, comfort, and a sense of being put together without trying.
The shirt leads with familiarity. A classic collar, a clean front placket, and a relaxed fit that moves with you. Vertical panel construction adds quiet structure, while hand-embroidered French knots trace along the seams - subtle and tactile. A curved hem lets you wear it your way, tucked or left out, without overthinking. Structured cuffs keep it grounded.
The pant balances it out. Tailored, straight, and easy through the leg - designed to sit clean without feeling restrictive. It completes the set with the same intention: simple, but not basic.
In naturally dyed indigo, the deep blue emerges from plant-based dyes: rich, time-honored, and beautifully alive.

Title: Curve Set - Pearl White
Body (HTML):
In pearl white, structure meets ease.
The Curve Set reimagines everyday essentials to better fit your lifestyle. It begins with a distinctive neckline, structured and individual, designed to be the first thing you notice.
The silhouette is elongated and clean, creating a look that feels put together without effort. A sleek centre slit introduces movement while keeping the overall form balanced and minimal.
Paired with straight leg trousers in hemp, the contrast in fabrics is intentional. The monochrome palette in pearl white brings a sense of ease while still feeling polished.
Desk, coffee, everything in between.

Fabric & Fit

Fabric: Hemp Cotton
Color: Pearl White
Top Fit: Comfort Fit, Structured Waist and Hip, Length: 50"
Pant Fit: Tailored Straight Fit, Length: 40" across all sizes
Model Fit: Model is 5'7" / wearing size S

Care Instructions

Care :
● Wash in cold water
● Use a gentle detergent
● Machine wash on a mild cycle or hand wash
● Air dry preferred, or tumble dry on low heat
● Iron on low heat
● Avoid bleach and harsh chemicals
● Do not overwash: air between wears
● Spot clean for small stains instead of full washing

Note:
● Wash separately for the first few washes, as slight colour release may occur.
● Garments with hand embroidery are best cared for through dry cleaning.
● Subtle variations in colour and texture are natural. Each piece is unique.
Just a little care, and the fabric will take care of the rest.

The Arc Dress is defined by its shoulders, where craft meets form. Hand-embroidered panels carry french knots, wooden beads, and shell accents, placed to draw ones eye.

It’s a piece that lets its detail breathe. Pockets, always.

Title: Effortless Dress - Pearl White
Body (HTML):
Some silhouettes know how to stand still and still command attention.
The Effortless Dress is exactly that, a long, uninterrupted line that holds its ground without excess. Clean and considered, the silhouette lets the collar lead. Structured and softly sculpted, it frames the neckline with intent, turning a minimal form into something perposeful.
Nothing rushed. Nothing unnecessary.
A straight fall, a subtle side slit for ease, and proportions that feel lived in from the first wear.
Pockets - deep, functional, and expected.
The dress has already thought it through.

Title: Daylight Dress - Sage Green
Body (HTML):
Short dresses rarely have this much to say.
The Daylight Dress is built on restraint, where a structured collar does the work of framing, shaping, and defining. Clean and considered brings a sense of polish without feeling rigid.
Hand-embroidered French knots appear in small, irregular clusters along the collar and the hem giving it a subtel feel. Each one slightly different, each one intentional.
The silhouette is easy, falling straight with just enough room to move. It’s the kind of piece that settles into your day without asking for attention.
Pockets are included, of course.

Title: Rosette Dress - Rust Bloom
Body (HTML):
A front-wrap dress that lets simplicity shine, celebrating effortless style in every curve.The Rosette Dress features an asymmetric wrap and a naturally falling V-neckline, creating effortless shape and elegance.The diagonal front creates movement across the body, subtle but defined, giving the silhouette its structure.
Along the neckline and running through the wrap, hand-embroidered French knots appear in irregular clusters - imperfect and intentional. Fabric-covered buttons fasten the wrap, becoming both closure and detail.
Pockets. Real ones.
In rust bloom, a tone that shifts with light - warm in the day, deeper as it settles.

Title: Twofold Dress - Rust Bloom
Body (HTML):
Two colours. One silhouette. Exactly as intended.
The Twofold Dress is a quiet play with contrast - a half-and-half construction where dusty black meets rust bloom in a clean line. The seam isn’t hidden; it’s where the story unfolds. French knots, wooden beads, and shell trace the meeting point, giving structure some movement.
An asymmetric neckline adds edge. The straight silhouette falls with ease, while the relaxed sleeves keep it grounded in comfort. A side slit breaks the line - subtle, but intentional - allowing movement without distraction.
of course we have Pockets.
A statement, without ever announcing itself.

Title: Still Day Dress - Ecru
Body (HTML):
Some days ask nothing of you. This dress understands that.
The Still Day Dress wears easy from the very first time: relaxed & breathable. The silhouette falls till the knee, shaped just enough to hold, never to restrict.
A structured band collar and clean front button placket bring a sense of order, while fine hand stitch details soften it back. Half sleeves with turn-up cuffs and fabric button tab detailing sit quietly, adding without asking for attention.
There are pockets. Deep ones.
In natural ecru; the undyed, unprocessed color of the cotton as it comes off the loom. No dyes, no treatments. Just cloth, as it is.

● Garments with hand embroidery are best cared for through dry cleaning.
● Subtle variations in colour and texture are natural. Each piece is unique.

Title: Outline Dress - Soft Teal
Body (HTML):
Short dresses with good bones.
The Outline Dress is built around asymmetry not as a statement, but as a structural choice that holds the garment together. Open sleeves fall easy and relaxed, while fine stitch lines trace the neckline and the front panel, each seam is deliberate, nothing excessive.
Side pockets are functional. Front pockets are architectural designed for form, not volume. Both exist with a purpose.
Crafted in a breathable hemp-cotton, an azo-free dyed soft teal tone that allows the construction to stand out, and the details to be seen over time, not just at first glance.
Made slowly, meant to be worn often.
